buildCommand: echo '=== configure lfs endpoint ===' && git config lfs.url "https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/maximeprn/baba-portfolio.git/info/lfs" && echo '=== git lfs install ===' && git lfs install --local && echo '=== git lfs pull ===' && git lfs pull && echo '=== vite build ===' && vite build && echo '=== dist/videos sample sizes ===' && ls -lh dist/videos | head -5
